metodos.codigoOriginal:
Private pVal, pDat
Select TmpBaixa
Delete All

_DopeCit = crSigCdPam.DopeCitens

Select TmpEnc
Delete All For Empty(Dopps) Or Empty(Numps)
Scan
	_Chave = _Empr + TmpEnc.Dopps + Str(TmpEnc.Numps, 6)

	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigOpEtq', 'crSigOpEtq', 'EmpDopNums', _Chave)
	Select crSigOpEtq
	Scan
		If (Grupos + Contas = crSigCdPam.GruConfs + crSigCdPam.ConConfs)
			ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigMvCab', 'LocalEest', 'EmpDopNums', crSigOpEtq.Empos + crSigOpEtq.DopeOs + Str(crSigOpEtq.Nu... [TRUNCADO]

LParameters _Form

ThisForm.ParentForm = _Form

ThisForm.DataSessionId  = ThisForm.ParentForm.DataSessionId
ThisForm.Get_Data.Value = ThisForm.ParentForm.Get_Data.Value
ThisForm.poDataMgr		= ThisForm.ParentForm.poDataMgr
Thisform.SigKey = CrSigCdPac.SigKeys

ThisForm.CarregaBars

with ThisForm.Grade
	.RecordSource = 'TmpBaixa'
	.Column1.ControlSource = 'TmpBaixa.CodBarra'
	.Column2.ControlSource = 'TmpBaixa.Cpros'
	.Column3.ControlSource = 'TmpBaixa.Dopes'
	.Column4.ControlSource = 'TmpBaixa.Num... [TRUNCADO]

Select TmpBaixa
Set Order to CodBarra

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Seek(This.Value)
		If (TmpBaixa.QtdeLido = 0)
			Replace QtdeLido With TmpBaixa.Qtde In TmpBaixa
		Else
			=Messagebox('Código de Barras Já Foi Lido!!!', 32, '')
		EndIf
		ThisForm.Grade.Refresh
		=Seek(This.Value)
		ThisForm.Grade.Refresh
	Else
		=Messagebox('Código de Barras Năo Cadastrado!!!', 32, '')
	EndIf
	This.Value = 0
	Return 0
EndIf

ThisForm.Grade.Refresh
* Fim *********************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Private pDat, pBar

If Messagebox('Confirma a Conferęncia das Etiquetas?', 4+32+256, '') = 7
	ThisForm.Get_Leitura.SetFocus
	Return 0
EndIf

Zap In crSigMvCab
Zap In crSigMvItn
Zap In crSigMvHst

Create Cursor xGrava (Grupo c(10), Conta c(10), CPros c(14), Qtds n(12,3))
Index On Grupo + Conta Tag GruConta

Select xGrava
Select Distinct Grupods, Contads ;
  From TmpBaixa ;
 Where QtdeLido <> 0 ;
  Into Cursor xCabec

_Dope = crSigCdPam.TransfEncs

Select xCabec
Scan
	_Nume = fGerUniqueKey(_Empr +... [TRUNCADO]

Select TmpBaixa
Set Order to CodBarra
Replace all TmpBaixa.QtdeLido with TmpBaixa.Qtde
ThisForm.Grade.Refresh

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select Distinct Grupods, Contads ; From TmpBaixa ; Where QtdeLido <> 0 ; Into Cursor xCabec
